name: Intent Detected
description: The primary intent of the caller. Used to track call volume by intent category.

name: Call Contained
description: Whether the call was fully resolved by the AI agent without transfer to a live agent. Primary containment KPI.

name: Identity Verified
description: Whether the caller successfully passed identity verification (policy number + last name).

name: Escalation Details
description: If the call was escalated, captures which queue and why. Used to identify escalation patterns.

name: Caller Sentiment
description: Overall caller sentiment during the call. Proxy metric for CSAT.

name: Call Success
description: Whether the call met its objective: fully contained or correctly escalated with context.
